scripts.test:dev:ci: VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID=${VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID:-ci-dev} playwright test --config app/playwright.config.ts app/dev/elk.spec.ts && VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID=${VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID:-ci-dev} playwright test --config app/playwright.config.ts app/dev/misskey.spec.ts && VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID=${VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID:-ci-dev} playwright test --config app/playwright.config.ts app/dev/npmx.spec.ts && VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID=${VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID:-ci-dev} playwright test --config app/playwright.config.ts app/dev/nuxt-ui.spec.ts && VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID=${VIZE_TEST_WORKTREE_ID:-ci-dev} playwright test --config app/playwright.config.ts app/dev/vuefes.spec.ts
